2066054624780664883.full_text:
🚨I CAN RUIN 4 YEARS OF FITNESS IN JUST 4 DAYS OF EATING 🚨

Virat Kohli :- "I come from a well-fed background. If I let myself go even a little, despite training for four years, I can gain weight in just four days. My cheeks start looking chubby  I’m not naturally lean like Shikhar paaji or KL Rahul. I’ve eaten so much sweet stuff in my life that it doesn’t even feel special anymore. Instead, I’ve become really good at feeding others. I turn into a bit of a salesman, telling people which cake is good and which sweet to try.

2066078871108321436.full_text:
🚨 AAKASH CHOPRA ON GURNOOR BRAR AND PRINCE YADAV 🚨 

Aakash Chopra said 🗣️,

"All of us were assuming that Prince would play, and when the match was reduced to 25 overs, it's very close to the T20 format, and Gurnoor Brar hadn't come after playing T20s just now, we started thinking that Prince would definitely play. However, the Indian team had prepared their plan beforehand that they would play Gurnoor because he is tall, has a high-arm action, generates good bounce, and has pace," 

"He was consistently on the other side of 145 clicks. He has been fast-tracked. Our fans lose a little objectivity at times. I am going to be objective. You are looking beyond the numbers because if only numbers are required, you can make a statistician a selector. They wanted pace and bounce, and both those things were seen in his game." [Aakash Chopra YT]
